Patch Set 3:

The following failure occurred consistently. It looks like a regression.

 CMD: onyx-50vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n llite.lustre-*.max_read_ahead_whole_mb
 Update not seen after 90s: wanted '3' got '2'
  conf-sanity test_28: @@@@@@ FAIL: check lustre.llite.max_read_ahead_whole_mb failed!

Patch Set 3:

The reason is know. Currently class_process_proc_param() only works for debugfs entries. It really should only work for sysfs entries. I have discussed with Oleg about this problem which is present upstream as well.
